steps.title: Identify the function
steps.content: The underlined sentence uses on the other hand to define horizontal gene transfer by contrasting it with vertical gene transfer. Its job is to explain one process via its distinction from a similar one.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: That contrastive purpose is exactly what choice A describes. B (flawed perception), C (future research), and D (claims similarity) all miss the contrast structure. That matches choice A — A is correct.
